message:
Improve contribute page ID validation UX

Changes:
- Set default category to "ideation" instead of empty
- Only show ID validation error when user has manually edited the ID
- Simplify effectiveId logic based on idTouched state

The validation now correctly distinguishes between auto-generated IDs
(which are always valid due to slugify) and manually-entered IDs that
may contain invalid characters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
